transcript: 35 saal ki mahila hai, Vata Prakriti. 2 hafte se kabz ki shikayat hai. Pet mein bharipan aur gas banti hai. Triphala Churna 5 gram raat ko garam paani ke saath. Abhayarishta 15ml subah shaam khana ke baad. Pavanamuktasana karein. 2 hafte mein follow up.

52 year old male patient with Pitta-Kapha prakriti. Chief complaint burning sensation in chest since 3 weeks. Diagnosed as Amlapitta. Avipattikar Churna 3g twice daily before food. Kamdudha Rasa 250mg with milk. Avoid spicy oily food. Follow up 2 weeks.

58 saal ka male patient, Vata-Kapha Prakriti. 3 mahine se ghutno mein dard aur sujan. Sandhivata diagnosis. Yogaraja Guggulu 2 goli subah shaam. Maharasnadi Kashaya 15ml khana ke baad. Avoid cold food. Trikonasana aur Veerabhadrasana. 1 hafte mein follow up.

28 years old female, Pitta prakriti. Skin rash on arms since 1 month. Itching worsens at night. Kaishore Guggulu 2 tablets twice daily. Mahamanjisthadi Kashaya 15ml morning and evening. Apply Jatyadi Taila externally. Avoid sour and spicy food. Follow up in 3 weeks.

45 saal ka purush, Kapha prakriti. 6 mahine se motapa badh raha hai. Weight 95 kg. Medohar Guggulu 2 goli subah shaam. Triphala Churna 5g raat ko garam pani se. Vigorous walking 45 minutes daily. No sweets. Follow up 1 month.

62 year old male, Vata-Pitta prakriti. High blood pressure since 2 years. Currently on medication. BP is 160/100. Sarpagandha Vati 250mg twice daily. Arjuna Churna 3g with milk at bedtime. Reduce salt intake. Shavasana and Pranayama. Follow up 2 weeks.

40 saal ki mahila, Pitta prakriti. 1 hafte se bukhar hai, 101 degree. Body pain aur weakness. Mahasudarshan Churna 3g subah shaam. Guduchi Kashaya 15ml twice daily. Rest advised. Light diet. Follow up 5 din.

30 year old male with Kapha prakriti. Chronic cough with phlegm since 3 weeks. Sitopaladi Churna 3g three times daily with honey. Kantakari Avaleha 5g twice daily. Steam inhalation recommended. Avoid cold drinks and dairy. 2 week follow up.

55 saal ka male, Vata prakriti. Peshab mein jalan aur pathri ki shikayat. Kidney stone 6mm. Chandraprabha Vati 2 goli subah shaam. Punarnavarishta 15ml after food. Increase water intake. Follow up 1 month.
38 year old female, Pitta-Kapha prakriti. Acidity and gas since 2 months. Aggravated by spicy food. Avipattikar Churna 3g before meals. Shatavari Churna 3g with milk. Follow up 3 weeks.

70 saal ki mahila. Vata-Kapha prakriti. Joint pain in both knees for 1 year. Difficulty walking. Maharasnadi Kashaya 15ml subah shaam. Dhanvantara Taila for external application on knees. Gentle Pranayama. Follow up 2 weeks.

25 year old male, Pitta prakriti. Piles problem since 6 months. Bleeding during motion. Arshakuthar Rasa 2 tablets twice daily. Abhayarishta 15ml after food. Increase fiber in diet. Sitz bath with lukewarm water. Follow up 3 weeks.
48 saal ka purush. Kapha prakriti. Sugar ki bimari hai 5 saal se. HbA1c 8.2. Nishamalaki Churna 3g subah shaam. Chandraprabha Vati 2 goli. Walk daily 30 min. No rice no sweets. Follow up 1 mahina.

33 year old female with Vata prakriti. Chronic constipation since 1 month. Hard stools. Bloating. Triphala Churna 5g at bedtime with warm water. Eranda Taila 10ml once weekly at bedtime. Increase water intake. Pawanmuktasana daily. Follow up 2 weeks.
42 saal ka male. Sama prakriti. Headache since 10 din. Stress related. Brahmi Vati 2 goli subah shaam. Ashwagandha Churna 3g raat ko doodh ke saath. Pranayama daily. Follow up 2 hafte.

50 year old female, Pitta prakriti. Eczema on hands since 2 months. Itching and redness. Kaishore Guggulu 2 tab twice daily. Haridrakhand 3g with warm water. Apply Jatyadi Ghrita externally. Avoid sour food. Follow up 1 month.
22 saal ki mahila. Pitta-Kapha prakriti. Nazla zukam 1 hafte se. Naak bahna aur chheenk. Tribhuvankirti Rasa 1 goli teen baar. Sitopaladi Churna shahad ke saath. Garam pani piyen. Follow up 1 hafte.

65 year old male with Vata prakriti. Chronic joint pain and stiffness in knees and lower back for 2 years. Morning stiffness lasting 1 hour. Yogaraja Guggulu 2 tab twice daily. Bala Taila for external massage. Gentle stretching. Follow up 1 month.
36 saal ki mahila. Kapha prakriti. Khansi 2 hafte se. Balgam wali khansi. Vasavaleha 5g subah shaam. Talisadi Churna shahad ke saath teen baar. Steam inhalation. Follow up 10 din.

44 year old male, Pitta prakriti. Hyperacidity since 1 month. Burning in stomach after meals. Avipattikar Churna 5g before lunch and dinner. Prawal Pishti 250mg twice daily with honey. Avoid tea coffee spicy food. Sheetali Pranayama. Follow up 3 weeks.
